campbell.title: Campbell City Council — September 2, 2025
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the city's finances for July 2025, including how the city's investments performed and the treasurer's account balances. They also discussed plans to improve transportation around Campbell by making it easier for residents to use multiple ways to get around, like buses, biking, and walking.
keyTopics: City investment performance and money management (July 2025)
Monthly treasurer's financial report
New multimodal transportation plan to improve buses, biking, and pedestrian access

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026 where residents could voice their opinions on a proposed new rule or law. After hearing public comments, the council moved forward by introducing the ordinance and skipping the standard first reading process, with plans to vote on final approval at their next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held to gather community input
New ordinance introduced and first reading waived
Final vote scheduled for next regular council meeting
Ordinance to be placed on consent calendar

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 7, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 7, 2026, to approve meeting minutes from several March sessions and authorize the Town Manager to sign a construction contract with QLM, Inc. The agenda was primarily administrative, focusing on documenting previous meetings and moving forward with a construction project.
keyTopics: Approved minutes from six March 2026 meetings (regular and closed sessions)
Authorized construction contract with QLM, Inc.
Administrative/housekeeping items

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 9, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council met to check on progress with programs helping kids and teens in the city, including youth mentorship and summer safety initiatives. The council also reviewed how the city's code enforcement is working and updated plans for improving library buildings and services.
keyTopics: Youth Empowerment Alliance and mentorship programs for young people
Safe Summer Initiative Grant to keep kids engaged and safe during summer months
Code enforcement performance and violations handling
Library facility upgrades and improvements to customer experience

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 7, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a meeting on April 7, 2026 that allowed residents to participate both in-person and online. Residents could join via Zoom or phone to watch and speak during public comment periods on agenda items.
keyTopics: Meeting offered virtual participation option via Zoom and phone
Residents could raise hand to speak during public comment on specific agenda items
Phone participants could unmute using *6 to be heard by the council

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 9, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale Human Relations Commission held a meeting on April 9, 2026, where they started with the Pledge of Allegiance and heard personal stories from three commissioners about their experiences in Sunnyvale. The group also approved the meeting minutes from their March gathering.
keyTopics: Personal stories shared by three commissioners about life in Sunnyvale
Approval of March 12, 2026 meeting minutes
Human Relations Commission regular business

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 8, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to discuss several community programs and initiatives. The meeting covered a food-related program called Budget and Bites, heard from a youth organization called Unmuted Tabs, and presented information about summer job opportunities for young people in the city.
keyTopics: Budget and Bites program presentation
Unmuted Tabs youth-led organization
City summer jobs opportunities for youth
Approval of previous meeting minutes from March 11

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 7, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on April 7, 2026 where residents could attend in person or join online via Zoom. The city is making it easy for people to participate and share their opinions by offering multiple ways to attend and submit comments.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format - attend in person or via Zoom
Remote participation options for residents who can't attend in person
Written public comment submission through eComments system
Meeting access via phone (1-669-900-6833) for those without video

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met on April 7, 2026 to discuss updates to the city's housing and community development plans for 2025-2030, review new project requests from individual council members, and consider changes to how the city fills council vacancies. The meeting also included routine items like approving previous meeting minutes and scheduling future meetings.
keyTopics: Updates to the 2025-2030 housing and community development plan
New project requests from council members
Changes to how council member vacancies are filled
Approval of previous meeting minutes and scheduling

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — March 31, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council reviewed and approved the financial plan for the city's gas utility service for 2027. This included approving how much money will be set aside in reserves and adjusting the rates that residential and commercial customers pay for natural gas service.
keyTopics: Gas utility rates may change for homes and businesses in 2027
City is planning its gas utility budget and reserve funds for next fiscal year
Rate adjustments planned for three customer categories: residential, commercial, and large commercial users
